heroHeadline: Day 42: UK PM Starmer Visits Gulf to Shore Up Ceasefire as Hormuz Shipping Remains at a Trickle
heroSubtitle: British PM Keir Starmer tours Gulf states to bolster the fragile US-Iran ceasefire. Despite the truce, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remains severely depressed, underscoring persistent economic disruption and market uncertainty about the ceasefire's durability.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-10. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
